utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Here . I need to borrow some moisturizer .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: For what ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What do you think ? Today the big day !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God . Okay , go into the bathroom , use whatever you want , just do not ever tell me what you did in there .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Thank you !

emotion_cause.span: 4_go into the bathroom , use whatever you want

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Where is Joey ? His mom on the phone .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: He is in the bathroom . I do not think you wanna go in there !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: C mon , we are roommates ! My eyes ! ! My eyes ! !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I warned you ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Who is being loud ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , that would be Monica .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey , listen , I wanna borrow a coupla things , Aurora spent the night , I really wanna make her breakfast .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , you got the whole night , huh ?

emotion_cause.span: 12_Aurora spent the night , I really wanna make her breakfast .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , well , I only have twenty minutes until Ethan , so , you know ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ooh , do I sense a little bit of resentment ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_I sense a little bit of resentment

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , no resentment , believe me , it is worth it .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Kay ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know in a relationship you have these key moments that you know you will remember for the rest of your life ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , every ... single ... second is like that with Aurora ... and I have just wasted about thirty ... five of them talking to you people , so , uh ... Monica , can you help me with the door ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , um , Chandler ? You know , the ... the old Monica would ... would remind you to scrub that Teflon pan with a plastic brush ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: But I am not gonna do that .
